inputs.label: Grant Price (Strike Price)
inputs.businessContext: The price at which the employee can purchase the stock.

businessContext_i18n.en: The price at which the employee can purchase the stock.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışanın hisse senedini satın alabileceği fiyat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Preis, zu dem der Mitarbeiter die Aktie kaufen kann.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le prix auquel l'employé peut acheter l'action.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio al que el empleado puede comprar la acción.

inputs.label: Current Stock Price
inputs.businessContext: Current market price of the company stock.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current market price of the company stock.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix actuel du marché de l'action de l'entreprise.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio actual de mercado de la acción de la empresa.

inputs.label: Number of Options Granted
inputs.businessContext: Total number of stock options granted to the employee.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of stock options granted to the employee.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışana verilen toplam hisse senedi opsiyonu sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der dem Mitarbeiter gewährten Aktienoptionen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'options sur actions attribuées à l'employé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de opciones sobre acciones concedidas al empleado.

inputs.label: Vested Options
inputs.businessContext: Number of options that have vested and are exercisable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of options that have vested and are exercisable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hak edilmiş ve kullanılabilir opsiyon sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Optionen, die unverfallbar und ausübbar sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'options qui ont été acquises et sont exerçables.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de opciones que se han adquirido y son ejercitables.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
